posts.author: HighCAGR
posts.community: V2 Retail - Second innings playing out well
posts.text: Thanks for sharing the framework, buddy, it’s really insightful. Really enjoyed reading, and in my limited understanding, its interesting to track the shift from store opening story to store maturation story. One thing that stood out to me from the management commentary was their apparent focus on sales productivity and inventory velocity over maximizing gross margins, which reminded me somewhat of Zudio’s approach. I also keep coming back to management’s comment that mature stores derive 68% revenue from repeat customers. To me, that feels like one of the strongest indicators of whether a sto…
